3236220.name: XenoTechArena Demo
3236220.description:
This is a trial version that can be played in 5-20 minutes.
You can play the tutorial + 1 stage.
The data from this work cannot be carried over to the main game.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Xenotech Arena is a Roguelite arena shooter set in Neo-Japan inspired arena.
A variety of characters such as Geisha Girl, Ninja Head, and Sumo Rider are playable.
Choose and collect over 70 different power-up items to enhance your player!
If you can get class change items, you can evolve and further enhance your players.
take on screen-filling monsters with your enhanced character
and enjoy the exhilarating experience of tackling and blasting them!
